headline: Alphabet Pentagon Talks Put Gemini And Valuation Questions In Focus
summary: Alphabet, parent of NasdaqGS:GOOGL, is in talks with the U.S. Pentagon to deploy Google Gemini AI models for classified defense uses. The potential agreement would mark a major expansion of Alphabet’s role in government and defense work. The discussions focus on how Gemini could support sensitive military applications while addressing ethical and policy safeguards. For Alphabet, known primarily for Google Search, YouTube and cloud services, deeper work with the Department of Defense would...
